name: credit_budget
description: Restore previously consumed budget for an agent. Use this after a payment bounces, a refund is received, or a transaction needs to be reversed. Requires Supervisor Tier 2 or higher. A reason is mandatory for audit trail purposes.

agent_id.description: The identifier of the agent to credit.

amount.description: Amount to restore in cents (e.g. 2500 for $25.00). Must be positive.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the credit (e.g. 'Payment bounced', 'Merchant refund received'). Required for audit trail.
